tools.Name: DeepTutor
tools.Description: An agent-native, personalized learning assistant that integrates chat, problem-solving, quiz generation, and math animation.
tools.Use_Case: Creating persistent, autonomous AI tutors with long-term memory for structured and personalized learning journeys.

tools.Name: SEO Machine
tools.Description: A specialized Claude Code workspace for researching, writing, and optimizing long-form SEO content.
tools.Use_Case: Automating the entire SEO content lifecycle, including competitive research, keyword mapping, and WordPress publishing.

tools.Name: AutoAgent
tools.Description: A fully-automated, zero-code framework that enables users to create and deploy LLM agents using only natural language.
tools.Use_Case: Building and orchestrating collaborative agent systems or deep research agents without manual coding or technical configuration.
